mapper.insert: insert into biz_backpacker_chat_read (order_id, user_id, last_read_message_id, update_time) values (#{orderId}, #{userId}, #{lastReadMessageId}, sysdate()) on duplicate key update last_read_message_id = greatest(last_read_message_id, #{lastReadMessageId}), update_time = sysdate()
mapper.select: select count(*) from biz_backpacker_chat_message m inner join biz_order o on o.order_id = m.order_id where (o.creator_id = #{userId} or o.executor_id = #{userId}) and m.sender_id != #{userId} and m.message_id > coalesce( (select r.last_read_message_id from biz_backpacker_chat_read r where r.order_id = m.order_id and r.user_id = #{userId}), 0)
